strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with deep TypeScript/Node.js and React product work
Hands-on AI agent development experience (MCP code generators, agentic workflow frameworks) at current role
Strong engineering craft: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, testing expertise, plus conference workshops and open-source test tooling
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin absent and Java experience appears dated/secondary (robotics work circa 2016-2018)
Significant investment in DLang ecosystem projects, a niche stack with limited direct relevance to this role

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and current Kotlin/Java exposure

response.justification: The candidate comfortably exceeds the 6+ years requirement with senior and staff-level fullstack roles centered on the exact primary stack (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes). Current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches the required AI agent development experience, and a strong testing and software-craftsmanship background aligns with the role's quality expectations. Gaps in Nest.js and recent Kotlin/Java are real but learnable given demonstrated polyglot ability across many languages and platforms.
